The '''LpM-549 Navigation Sensor''',<ref name="EGVV" /> also known as the '''LpM-549 computer system'''<ref name="SC">{{StoryCite|story=The Stele Chronicles|book=Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)}}</ref> and the '''549 sensor pallet'''<ref name="FF44">{{FactFile|44|BWI 1-2|B-Wing}}</ref> was a model of navigation [[Sensor/Legends|sensor]] manufactured by [[Microaxial/Legends|Microaxial]]. The unit was a component of [[Slayn & Korpil/Legends|Slayn & Korpil's]] [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing starfighter]].<ref name="EGVV" /> The LpM-549 Navigation Sensor was linked to a [[Navigation computer/Legends|navigation computer]] and was capable of storing two sets of jump coordinates for [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] travel.<ref name="FF44" />
